text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm all set! Zazen meditation workshop, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Harmonizing my mind and polishing my presence
as a model student... What an ingenious plan I've
come up with! I have to do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monk
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let your eyes slowly close. Concentrate and
don't make a sound...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! Close my eyes! And be quiet... quiet...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Haaah, haaah... I-I feel so tired. So this is zazen...

text_block_list.name: Zazen Trial Participants
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Zazen meditation is incredible! My mind
and body feel so much lighter!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
H-how can that be? Does that mean... I... I didn't
do it right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her mood worsens as she's confronted with her
own lack of experience.
